mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_info (user_id, user_name, photo, ip, email, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{nickname}, #{photo}, '{}', #{email}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT user_name FROM user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_info WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_info SET user_name = #{nickname}, photo = #{photo}, ip = profile, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
